title: FSL Assistant Custom GPT / Gem / Project (was jssm#863)
manager: Publish an 'FSL Assistant' as a Custom GPT, Gemini Gem, and Claude Project (was jssm#863) — a ready-made, FSL-expert assistant in each major model's app store. A user picks it and immediately has a helper that writes and checks machines; it's distribution directly into the places people now go to get coding help.
